summary: Lead accepts M7 map topology client implementation after systems_architect R3 ACCEPT and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The player-facing default map now consumes topology-backed district polygons, explicit route-node anchors, and topology path-preview reason codes instead of the legacy M2 grid path. Browser Pixi renders route-node markers as visual-only anchors, renders only explicit route 24, and continues to avoid fake district-endpoint lines from centroid, bounding box, nearest-neighbor, visual adjacency, row/column, hex, or hidden-lattice inference.
accepted_changes: Default bootstrapped Web shell now uses createM7TopologyClientReadModelSnapshot and topology/path-preview DTO projection.
Client read model projects 14 irregular topology districts, 8 route-node anchors, 25 topology route sources, path previews, anti-grid evidence, and one drawable explicit route 24.

Browser Pixi renderer now renders anchor markers from MapAnchorRenderInstruction and exposes data-anchor-count without using anchors for authority, hit testing, route inference, adjacency, reachability, or commands.
UI exposes localized topology route preview copy, reason-code explanations, route source counts, District 1 obligation action context, and synchronized map/task/list/inspector state.

Tests cover no default M2 grid path, visual-neighbor-without-route, visually-distant explicit route, blocked/capacity reason copy, route-node anchor count, route source count, and perturbed topology DTO re-projection invariants.

Task evidence screenshots at 1440x900 and 1280x720 show irregular districts, visible route-node markers, explicit route 24, legend/context affordances, and no rectangular, hex, or regular-lattice board.

integration_gates.details: Vite build passed with existing chunk-size warnings
Storybook build passed with existing Vite chunk/plugin timing warnings
format, lint, typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed
No forbidden path, dependency, lockfile, protocol, sim-core, save-format, content-source, gate/roadmap, tools, CI, manifest, or validation report diff

remaining_risks.summary: Only route 24 has drawable route-node-to-route-node geometry in the accepted DTO surface.
remaining_risks.boundary: Accepted for this task. Future full-route visualization must add explicit per-edge polyline DTO/read-model support in a schema-owned task, not infer geometry in the client.

remaining_risks.summary: Route-node markers are low-fidelity visual dots.
remaining_risks.boundary: Accepted for topology recovery; final art production remains out of this task.

next_action: Commit accepted implementation, open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, sync main, then mark task CLOSED and start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001.
